sentence: 长江流域的气候比较温暖湿润。
pinyin: Cháng Jiāng liú yù de qì hòu bǐ jiào wēn nuǎn shī rùn.
english: The climate in the Yangtze River basin is relatively warm and humid.

sentence: 他一放学就回家打游戏，不做作业。
pinyin: Tā yī fàng xué jiù huí jiā dǎ yóu xì, bù zuò zuò yè.
english: As soon as school is out, he goes home to play games instead of doing homework.

sentence: 她头上戴着一顶红色的帽子很可爱。
pinyin: Tā tóu shàng dài zhe yī dǐng hóng sè de mào zi hěn kě ài.
english: The red hat she has on her head looks really cute.

sentence: 她从小爱读书，长大后成了出名的才女。
pinyin: Tā cóng xiǎo ài dú shū, zhǎng dà hòu chéng le chū míng de cái nǚ.
english: She loved reading from a young age and grew up to become a well-known talented woman.

sentence: 她周末经常参加公益活动帮助社区。
pinyin: Tā zhōumò jīngcháng cānjiā gōngyì huódòng bāngzhù shèqū.
english: She often takes part in public welfare activities to help the community on weekends.
